channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: FDA Continues Investigation of Taylor Farms Lettuce Despite False Positive
item.description: The FDA said that as of Sunday, it had not found any "confirmed positive sample results for product testing" in the cyclosporiasis outbreak.

item.title: Suspect in custody after detonating incendiary device near NYC federal building
item.description: A man known for opposing Immigration and Customs Enforcement set off an incendiary device outside a Manhattan federal building, authorities said.

item.title: Judge orders Paramount and Warner to pause merger for at least two weeks
item.description: A federal judge ruled Monday that Paramount and Warner Bros must delay their merger for at least 14 days.

item.title: 401(k) fees could reduce retirement savings by tens of thousands
item.description: Research shows about 40% of workers are unaware they pay fees on their 401(k) plans. Here is what to know.
